title: Sodium Cloud Fix For Beta Fog Distance
description: adjusts cloud fade for sodium clouds to match beta minecraft fog distances via the sodium core shader support mod
body:
# Sodium Cloud Fade Fix For Beta Fog Distances

**Adjusts Sodium's cloud fade distance for closer fog start multipliers**

---
Early minecraft had a closer fog start distance than modern minecraft which contributes to the look and that fog start is 1/3 of the current fog start distance. Luckily you can adjust the distance if you are using Sodium with Sodium Extra but it does not adjust the cloud fade accordingly leading to some weird results. This pack just fixes that with a resource pack shader made specifically for Sodium it requires Sodium Core Shader Support to function correctly

## Requires
- [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/PtjYWJkn) and [Sodium Core Shader Support](https://modrinth.com/project/G8yJPRdl)
- set the fog start distance in sodium extra to 33%
- to change the fade distance go into clouds.fsh and change fogstartmultiplier to the decimal value of ur desired percentage
